name: task-automations
description: Automation brain for Park Ministry parking pass operations.

scripts.help: node -e "console.log(['PARK MINISTRY COMMANDS','','MAIN','  npm run buying:live','  npm run buying:live:force-event-id','  npm run listing:reachpro','  npm run sales:track','  npm run fulfillment:run','  FULFILLMENT_AUTOMATION_LIMIT=25 npm run fulfillment:limited','','DEBUG','  npm run listing:reachpro:force-event-id','  npm run debug:fulfillment:preview','  npm run debug:fulfillment:validate-pdfs','  npm run debug:fulfillment:stubhub','  npm run debug:way:checkout','  npm run debug:way:buy-pass','','Examples','  npm run buying:live:force-event-id','  LISTING_FORCE_EVENT_IDS=160123456 npm run buying:live:force-event-id','  LISTING_ALLOW_SMARTSUITE_EVENT_ID_ONLY_FALLBACK=1 npm run listing:reachpro:force-event-id','  FULFILLMENT_AUTOMATION_LIMIT=25 npm run fulfillment:limited','  npm run fulfillment:run'].join('\n'))"
